mapper.insert: insert into showcle_file( owner_idx, type, file_type, file_size, save_file_name, real_file_name, save_path, web_path, file_key, discarded, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{ownerIdx}, #{type}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{saveFileName}, #{realFileName}, #{savePath}, #{webPath}, #{fileKey}, #{discarded}, now(), #{createdBy} )
